title: ImprovementProposal
description: A proposal to improve the openclaw or claude_code system, generated from one or more improvement signals.

target_plane.description: The system plane this proposal targets.

proposal_type.description: Category or type of the proposed improvement.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of what this proposal intends to change or improve.

risk_level.description: Assessed risk level of applying this proposal.

version.description: Schema version of this proposal document.

project_id.description: Optional identifier of the project this proposal is scoped to.

evidence_signal_ids.description: Optional list of signal_id values that provide evidence for this proposal.

autonomous_action_allowed.description: Whether this proposal may be applied autonomously without human approval.

requires_manual_approval.description: Whether this proposal requires explicit manual approval before being applied.

proposed_changes.description: Optional list of file-level changes this proposal intends to make.

path.description: File path affected by this change.

action.description: The action to be taken on this file (e.g., create, modify, delete).

expected_benefit.description: Optional list of expected benefits if this proposal is applied.

priority_score.description: Optional numeric priority score for ranking proposals.

confidence.description: Optional confidence level in this proposal's analysis and recommendations.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of this proposal.
